generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input (IM) and torque output (τM), coupled with a gear transmission followed by a cycloidal gear to achieve a low gear ratio"
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "motor position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
    base:desc "gearbox position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "raw motor position data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, SysML
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "raw gearbox position data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, SysML
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for structural modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and product layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables RequirementsTraceabilityService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin development"

]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables ACMEModelingService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

]

]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 serial robot with six axes, first vertical axis analyzed for joint friction"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation follows the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) structured as a UML class diagram (Fig. 1), comprising Asset (physical entities), Model (subtypes: EngineeringModel, DataCalculationModel, SimulationModel), and Processing components responsible for data collection and transformation. This model establishes a one-way data flow from physical assets to digital representations without autonomous feedback mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data, specifically targeting friction loss detection in the robot's first axis. The system addresses limitations in existing friction models by incorporating continuous improvement methods for both white-box (physics-based) and black-box (data-driven) approaches during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for sensor data streaming; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML [17] for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26] for Architecture Description Languages (ADLs), and SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) [17,27], which enable standardized component & connector perspectives and interoperability across heterogeneous stakeholders and tools."
]
